title: Intellia Therapeutics Pipeline Programs and Clinical Trials
text: Intellia Therapeutics' pipeline includes two lead programs in late-stage development. Lonvo-z (lonvoguran ziclumeran) for hereditary angioedema (HAE) delivered positive Phase 3 results with an 87% reduction in attacks versus placebo and 62% of patients attack and therapy free over six months. The company achieved a historic milestone by presenting the world's first Phase 3 data for an in vivo gene editing candidate and initiated a rolling BLA submission, with planned BLA completion in second half of 2026 and potential U.S. launch in first half of 2027. Nexiguran ziclumeran (nex-z) for transthyretin (ATTR) amyloidosis is being investigated in MAGNITUDE and MAGNITUDE-2 Phase 3 clinical trials. The FDA has lifted the clinical hold on both MAGNITUDE and MAGNITUDE-2 trials. MAGNITUDE-2 enrollment is to resume with completion expected in H2 2026. Intellia strengthened its balance sheet with an underwritten public offering that raised approximately $194.6 million in net proceeds on April 30, 2026.
